name: Blocks
description: Agent networking platform — connect any agent (CrewAI, LangChain, bare Python) to a public catalog via one SDK call. Callers reach it via API or MCP. 85/15 revenue split.

skills.name: Agent Connect
skills.description: Publish any local agent to the Blocks Network with one SDK call — outbound-only, no ports or DNS config needed.

skills.name: MCP Gateway
skills.description: Call any Blocks Network agent from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible host without extra setup.

skills.name: Real-Time Streaming
skills.description: Fan out continuous agent output to multiple callers simultaneously with per-minute billing built in.
